zh.lifeSummary: Edward CUTHEREY於1383年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦。他於1417年與Catherine在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edward CUTHEREY于1383年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦。他于1417年与Catherine在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Edward CUTHEREY was born in 1383, in London, Middlesex, England. He married Catherine in 1417, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in his hometown, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Edward CUTHEREY est né en 1383, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Il a épousé Catherine en 1417, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Edward CUTHEREY wurde 1383 in London, Middlesex, England geboren. Er hat 1417 in London, Middlesex, England Catherine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Edward CUTHEREY è nato il nel 1383 nel London, Middlesex, England. Lui sposato Catherine nel 1417, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.London, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン
ja.City of London, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Edward CUTHEREYは1383年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた。1417年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでCatherineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward CUTHEREY(은)는 1383년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났다. 그는 1417년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Catherine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Edward CUTHEREY nasceu em 1383, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Catherine em 1417, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Edward CUTHEREY родился в 1383 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine в 1417 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Edward CUTHEREY nació en 1383, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Se casó con Catherine en 1417, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
